violations.text: Ambient temperature of the 2-door lowboy unit observed at 42 -43 degrees Fahrenheit. Butter in this unit observed with a temperature of 43 degrees F. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. TCS foods are not to be stored in this unit until it is maintaining a consistent temperature at/below 41 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2023
